name: packetdrive-desktop
description: PacketDrive desktop shell — Electron wrapper that runs the backend and serves the frontend.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run build:main && cross-env ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm --prefix ../frontend run build && npm run build:main
